hero.title: Goalify
hero.subtitle: Professional Project Management Tool
hero.description: Powerful Gantt chart features to help you efficiently manage project progress, tasks, and team collaboration

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Goalify provides professional project management tools to help you efficiently plan and execute projects

gantt.title: Gantt Chart View
gantt.description: Intuitive Gantt chart display of project progress, easily manage task timelines and dependencies

projects.title: Multi-Project Management
projects.description: Support for managing multiple projects simultaneously, flexible switching, efficient workflow organization

subtasks.title: Subtask Tracking
subtasks.description: Break down complex tasks into subtasks, track completion progress, ensure smooth project advancement

milestones.title: Milestone Management
milestones.description: Set key milestones, mark important nodes, control overall project progress

timeline.title: Timeline Visualization
timeline.description: Clear display of task timelines, quickly identify delay risks and resource conflicts

collaboration.title: Team Collaboration
collaboration.description: Cloud data synchronization, support multi-device access, team collaboration more convenient

download.title: Download Client
download.subtitle: Choose the version suitable for your operating system to start using Goalify
download.security: All versions have passed security testing, please download with confidence

footer.description: Goalify is a professional project management tool that provides powerful Gantt chart features to help teams efficiently manage projects and tasks.
